content.json:
## Feature Adoption Dashboard
Which features users reach, and whether they come back. Open events match `[Oo]pened$` to include `createOpened`, `restoreOpened`, `rbac.*Opened`.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name matches regex "[Oo]pened$"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id), Opens = count() by Feature = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1])
| order by Users desc
| take 15
| render barchart
content.title: Feature Popularity (distinct users)

content.query:
let steps = dynamic(["connection.connectCompleted","dataExplorer.opened","queryEditor.opened","queryEditor.queryCompleted","ragChat.opened","ragChat.requestCompleted"]);
customEvents
| extend shortName = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1])
| where shortName in (steps)
| where isempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Step = shortName
| extend Order = array_index_of(steps, Step)
| order by Order asc
| project Step, Users
| render barchart
content.title: User Journey Funnel (distinct users reaching each step)

content.query:
let firstUse = customEvents
    | where name matches regex "[Oo]pened$"
    | extend feature = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1])
    | summarize firstDay = min(bin(timestamp, 1d)) by user_Id, feature;
let laterUse = customEvents
    | where name matches regex "[Oo]pened$"
    | extend feature = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
    | join kind=inner firstUse on user_Id, feature
    | where day >= firstDay + 7d
    | summarize returned = dcount(user_Id) by feature;
firstUse
| summarize adopters = dcount(user_Id) by feature
| join kind=leftouter laterUse on feature
| extend RetentionPct = round(100.0 * todouble(coalesce(returned, 0)) / adopters, 1)
| project feature, adopters, returned = coalesce(returned, 0), RetentionPct
| order by RetentionPct desc
content.title: Feature Retention (7-day, by user_Id)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name matches regex "[Oo]pened$"
| extend feature = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1])
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by feature, Week = startofweek(timestamp)
| order by Week asc
| render timechart
content.title: Feature Usage Over Time (weekly active users per feature)
